    "High risk of thermal runaway, localized fire, or arc flash hazard"

    "Immediately isolate and de-energize the electrical panel following proper LOTO procedures",

  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a distinct, irregular sputtering and crackling sound characteristic of electrical arcing rather than a steady 60 Hz electromagnetic hum. This indicates a loose or failing termination under load, presenting an immediate fire and safety hazard that requires urgent isolation and remediation.",
